description: AWS Access Key ID for the integration (omit if using web identity/role).
AWS Secret Access Key for the integration (omit if using web identity/role).
Path to web identity token for IRSA/oidc auth (optional).
Credentials or token for credentialed audit sinks (Splunk/GCP/Azure/http). Required when audit.sink_type is splunk, azure, gcp, or http.
